description_long: This is a compact, two-door coupe car finished in a light blue color, featuring a sleek and sporty silhouette. The vehicle has a sloping fastback roofline, large black alloy wheels, and tinted windows that enhance its modern appearance. The front end displays a low, aerodynamic profile with a prominent Volkswagen badge and integrated headlights. The rear is characterized by a wide stance, dual exhaust pipes, and a subtle spoiler integrated into the hatch. Side mirrors are streamlined and body-colored, while the door handles are flush with the car's surface. The overall design suggests a focus on urban agility and style, with a likely interior composed of fabric, plastic, and metal elements.
description: A light blue, two-door coupe car with a fastback roofline, black alloy wheels, and a sporty, modern design. Features include tinted windows, dual exhausts, and a prominent Volkswagen badge.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide stance, dual exhaust pipes, rear window, and subtle integrated spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's two-door configuration, large black wheels, and fuel cap.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the low, aerodynamic nose, Volkswagen badge, and integrated headlights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the coupe profile and black alloy wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
